chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1267 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For order on MA No 5768/2017 3. For katcha Peshi 31.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G -=-=- This petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 09.05.2017. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 08.5.2017 and since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is pursuing this petition diligently which is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
